note: V11 banner FIX (v11-phase2) — Phase 2 lottery economics wording corrected. Previous banner said '50% of the protocol-side allocation' which was numerically ambiguous: protocol-side = Gold 25% + PoPC 25% = 50% of block reward, so '50% of protocol-side' could read as 25% of block reward. The actual rule is that on triggered blocks the FULL protocol-side allocation (Gold + PoPC, together 50% of the block reward) is redirected to lottery / pending — the PoW miner's 50% share is never touched. Banner now says 'the full protocol-side allocation … 50% of the block reward'. Coinbase shape is unchanged from C8 (3 / 1 / 2 outputs for non-triggered / UPDATE / PAYOUT). V11_SPEC.md §4.5 / §4.6 / §4.7 / §10.5 / §9.4 also rewritten to match C7+C8 implementation (variable output count, explicit emission invariant, RESOLVED jackpot rollover question). DRAFT v3.4 added. test-coinbase-phase2 extended with subsidy=8 worked example: 46/46 pass. No consensus behaviour change — V11_PHASE2_HEIGHT remains INT64_MAX.
